positive_prompt: Keep the camera fixed. Clear serum slowly travels down the pipette and gathers into a rounded droplet at the tip; the droplet elongates under gravity, detaches near the end, and falls toward the cut truffle while the pipette and bottle remain still.
scene_plan: Over the five-second fixed shot, serum moves subtly inside the pipette as one droplet steadily swells at its tip. Surface tension holds it while it lengthens, then it releases close to the end and falls toward the cut truffle, leaving a tiny fresh bead at the pipette tip. The bottle, label, and truffles stay stationary so the texture demonstration remains the sole action.
